column1: # Manual adjustments to protein degradation rates. If "units" is empty, "value" is a
# multiplicative factor applied to the current degradation rate. If "units" is a time
# unit (e.g. "min"), "value" is an absolute half life and the degradation rate is set
# to ln(2) / half_life. Names must include the compartment suffix (e.g. "[c]").

column5: yibQ, Predicted polysaccharide deacetylase; This protein is fit for the anaerobic condition
murD, UDP-N-acetylmuramoyl-L-alanine--D-glutamate ligase; set absolute half life to a value from Gupta et al. 2024 (carbon-limited) data
